fields.name: Hotel Grab-and-Go Breakfast
fields.description: Quick breakfast in the hotel lobby or breakfast area — coffee, pastries, fruit and pre-made sandwiches for a fast meal before your meeting.

output.reasoning: User's first meeting is at 9:00 AM and Day 2 lacks breakfast. Inserting a quick hotel breakfast at position 0 schedules it before the meeting with time for a short walk to the meeting location.
